message:
chore(gitignore): exclude bv (beads viewer) local state directory

The `.bv/` directory contains machine-local configuration and cached
data generated by bv, the graph-aware triage engine used as an AI
sidecar for the beads issue tracking system.

This directory stores:
- Local caches for graph metric computations (PageRank, betweenness, etc.)
- Session-specific state that varies between developer machines
- Runtime artifacts that should not be shared across environments

Like other developer tooling directories already ignored (`.vscode/`,
`.idea/`), this state is ephemeral and machine-specific. Including it
in version control would cause unnecessary merge conflicts and bloat
the repository with non-essential, regenerable data.

The beads issue data itself lives in `.beads/` and remains tracked
as the authoritative source of truth for issue state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,3 +28,6 @@ bun-debug.log*
 # Lock files (optional - you may want to keep bun.lockb for reproducible builds)
 # bun.lockb
 
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
